questions.question: What Siberian lake contains 20 percent of the world's unfrozen fresh water?
What sitcom siren of the nineties founded a gourmet crouton business in the eighties?
What former U.S. secretary of state noted: 'The illegal we do immediately. The unconstitutional takes longer'?
What part of a piano is made from the pricey wood of Mpingo trees?
What canned goods brand was named after its three founders–Boyd, Art and Dennis?
What VH-1 host claims life's essentials are 'flawless, fierce attitude, disposable razors and shaving gel'?
